article1.title: Article 1 – Purpose
article1.content: These Terms of Use define the terms and conditions for using the Blablabook website. Using the site implies full acceptance of these Terms of Use.

article2.title: Article 2 – Site Publisher
article2.content1: The Blablabook website is published as part of an educational project carried out by a working group.
article2.content2: No formal legal structure (company or declared association) has been established to date.
article2.contact: For any questions, you can contact:

article3.title: Article 3 – Hosting
article3.content: The site is provisionally hosted on a cloud hosting platform (e.g., Vercel or equivalent). Precise hosting information may be updated later.

article4.title: Article 4 – Service Description
article4.content1: Blablabook is an application that allows users to:
list: mark books as read or to be read.
article4.content2: Book-related data (titles, descriptions, images) are exclusively sourced from the Google Books API. The site does not modify this content.

article5.title: Article 5 – Access to the Service
article5.content1: The site is freely accessible to any user with internet access.
list: Access to certain features (personal library) requires creating an account.
Browsing books can be done without an account.
article5.content2: The publisher does not guarantee continuous, uninterrupted access.

article6.title: Article 6 – Registration Conditions
article6.content1: To create an account, the user must:
article6.content2: The user is responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials.

article7.title: Article 7 – Personal Data
article7.content1: The site only collects the following data:
article7.content3: Strictly technical cookies may be used to:
article7.content4: No tracking or behavioral analysis is performed.

article8.title: Article 8 – Intellectual Property
article8.content1: The displayed content (books, images, descriptions) comes from the Google Books API and remains the property of their respective rights holders. The Blablabook application claims no rights over this content.
article8.content2: The user only has a right to personal, non-commercial use.

article9.title: Article 9 – Use of the Service
list: attempt to access systems without authorization;
divert the service from its normal use;
compromise the security or integrity of the site.
article9.content2: Any breach may result in the suspension or deletion of the account.

article10.title: Article 10 – Account Management
article10.content1: The user can request the deletion of their account at any time.
article10.content2: The publisher reserves the right to suspend or delete an account and refuse access to the service without notice in case of non-compliance with these Terms of Use.

article11.title: Article 11 – Liability
article11.content1: The site is provided "as is", without warranty.
list: The publisher cannot be held liable for service interruptions (especially those related to the Google Books API);
temporary or permanent unavailability of the service.
article11.content2: The user acknowledges using the service at their own risk.

article12.title: Article 12 – Service Evolution
article12.content: The site may be modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time without notice. No continuity guarantee is provided, especially in the context of an educational project.

article13.title: Article 13 – Modification of the Terms of Use
article13.content: These Terms of Use may be modified at any time. Users will be informed in case of substantial changes.

article14.title: Article 14 – Applicable Law
article14.content: These Terms of Use are governed by French law. In case of dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, French courts will have jurisdiction.
